note: A/B landing-page experiments built by Polly. Performance refreshed weekly. Empty fields = awaiting Polly's data pull.

experiments.name: Board Game Sale — dedicated LP
experiments.hypothesis: A focused single-product sale page converts paid traffic better than the Shopify product page.
experiments.polly_note: Awaiting traffic + conversion split from Polly (GA4 / experiment data).

experiments.name: Multilingual variants (EN / FR / DE / IT)
experiments.hypothesis: Localized landing pages lift conversion in non-English markets vs the English page with auto-translate.
experiments.polly_note: Note from Bengt's data: FR page is at 0.28–0.54% conversion vs 3%+ EN. Polly to confirm variant split + recommend fix or pause.
